prompt_text:
### Demographics: 77-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 21 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Alzheimer's Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 98.7 kg; Height 176.7 cm; BMI 31.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 8.6%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 262mg/dL; 9 months ago 238mg/dL; 6 months ago 203mg/dL; 3 months ago 187mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 96.2kg; 9 months ago 96.2kg; 6 months ago 93.3kg; 3 months ago 92.9kg; current 98.7kg), Height (12 months ago 176.7cm; 9 months ago 176.7cm; 6 months ago 176.7cm; 3 months ago 176.7cm; current 176.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 31.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 104U/L; 9 months ago 99U/L; 6 months ago 90U/L; 3 months ago 87U/L; current 103U/L), AST (12 months ago 104U/L; 9 months ago 107U/L; 6 months ago 104U/L; 3 months ago 91U/L; current 110U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 55mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 169mg/g; 9 months ago 216mg/g; 6 months ago 197mg/g; 3 months ago 141mg/g; current 159mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 165mg/dL; 9 months ago 180mg/dL; 6 months ago 181mg/dL; 3 months ago 181mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
